prompt: A dynamic low-angle shot of your face crouching in a damp alley, resting one arm on your knee. You’re dressed in a waterproof black parka with reflective strips, hood down, under a dripping fire escape. A broken neon sign flickers above, casting a pulsating red glow. Shot on Nikon Z6 II with 24mm f/1.8 S, ISO 1250, f/2.5, 1/125s. Pose: grounded, tense, ready to move. Expression: sharp, focused, slightly guarded. Lighting: flickering neon + cold blue streetlamp from a distance.
